node.statement: MODEL M2 (Activated transport — semi-phenomenological): At plateau center (nu near p/q): R_xx ~ R_xx^0 * exp(-Delta(nu)/(2*k_B*T)). Gap Delta is AB INITIO from ED. Activation form is standard for gapped systems (Arrhenius law). Prefactor R_xx^0 depends on sample geometry — PHENOMENOLOGICAL. [P11-Girvin Sec 1.6; P10-Dykhne Sec I]
